title: cota cretacea
intro: Cota cretacea, also known as sea plantain, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is commonly found in coastal areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cota cretacea include its ability to aid in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Cota cretacea can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and valuable addition to a natural medicine cabinet.
